---
name: Submit a skill idea
about: Propose a skill for the repo. A steward will help package it if you are not a developer.
title: "[Skill idea] <short title>"
labels: skill-idea

## What problem does Claude solve for you?

<!-- One or two sentences. Be specific. -->

## How do you currently do it manually?

<!-- Describe the steps you take today. -->

## How often do you use this?

- [ ] Daily
- [ ] Weekly
- [ ] Monthly
- [ ] Occasionally

## Should this run in one project or across all of them?

- [ ] One project only
- [ ] All my projects
- [ ] Not sure

## Anything else a steward should know?

<!-- Existing prompts, templates, or examples that help explain the idea. -->
